description: Vertical graphic on a dark navy background. The upper left has a line-drawing icon in light blue of a hand holding a pen marking a checklist sheet, with two checkbox marks rendered in yellow. The upper right shows a large stylized '2025' in yellow with curved text reading 'END-OF-YEAR REVIEW' arced around it. Centered lower text in white and yellow reads 'USCIS revised the naturalization test to ensure new citizens understand the rights and responsibilities of U.S. citizenship.' The bottom left carries the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal and wordmark.
notable_text: 2025 END-OF-YEAR REVIEW; USCIS revised the naturalization test to ensure new citizens understand the rights and responsibilities of U.S. citizenship.; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
